name: Torrey Pines North
address: 11480 N Torrey Pines Rd, La Jolla, CA 92037
designer: William F. Bell (original); Tom Weiskopf redesign (2016)
green_fee_notes: City of San Diego rates effective Jan. 1, 2026: non-resident 18-hole green fee is $163 weekday / $204 weekend-holiday ($51 / $68 for San Diego residents), non-resident twilight $97 / $123, with carts $48 extra (fees do not include a cart).
notable: Redesigned by Tom Weiskopf in 2016, a renovation that enlarged greens, reduced bunkering, and swapped the front and back nines
Co-hosts the opening rounds of the PGA Tour's Farmers Insurance Open alongside the South Course
City of San Diego municipal course on clifftops above the Pacific, adjacent to Torrey Pines State Natural Reserve, handling roughly 100,000 rounds per year
Course record is 61, shot by Mark Brooks (1990) and Brandt Snedeker (2007)

confidence.lat: Coordinates are for the overall Torrey Pines facility, not the North first tee.
confidence.rating_tee: Ratings/slopes from the official City of San Diego scorecard (04/2020 printing), cross-checked against GolfPass; USGA NCRDB unreachable (403).
confidence.tees: Men's values from the official scorecard, dated 04/2020; no newer official card found as of July 2026.
confidence.year_opened: 1957 per Wikipedia and course databases; official city pages do not state it.
